title: Department Manager Vacancy at Kalyan Jewellers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Kalyan Jewellers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Kalyan Jewellers in Ranchi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Kalyan Jewellers:
Kalyan Jewellers is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers!
